description_long: This is a single-story rectangular bungalow with a weathered exterior, featuring a mix of stucco and siding. The structure has multiple windows of varying sizes, some grouped together, and several doors providing access from different sides. The roof is a simple gable style, with visible eaves and a slight pitch. There are tarps and draped materials covering portions of the exterior, suggesting ongoing maintenance or temporary storage. The front facade includes a small set of steps leading to the main entrance, and the surrounding ground is uneven with patches of grass and dirt. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with signs of age and practical modifications.
description: A weathered, single-story rectangular bungalow with a gable roof, multiple windows, and tarps covering parts of the exterior. The facade features a small entryway and visible signs of age and use.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with a row of windows and a mostly intact wall, with some tarps visible inside the open courtyard.
description_view_1: This view highlights the gable end with a door, a set of steps, and a blue tarp covering part of the wall.
description_view_2: This view displays the rear side with grouped windows and more extensive tarp coverage, as well as a partially open wall.
description_view_3: This view presents the main facade with the entry steps, several doors, and a mix of windows, giving a clear look at the front of the bungalow.
